title: cytisus scoparius f. albus
intro: Cytisus scoparius f. albus, also known as white broom, is a flowering plant that is a variant of the broom plant (Cytisus scoparius), characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and slender stems. The medicinal properties of white broom include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating conditions such as digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of white broom include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote a good night's sleep, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. White broom can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
